editable_paths: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

instruction_summary: Handle issues #10 and #11 in the easier order, reshaping Document/DocumentVersion granularity around individual documents and shifting Docusaurus site display toward project-based routes.
actual_work: Refactored the external sample seed flow so a site directory becomes one Project, individual markdown pages become Documents, and snapshot directories become DocumentVersions of those documents. Added project-level site routing through ProjectSitesController and changed document HTML links to redirect into project site URLs. Introduced helper methods on DocumentVersion for normalized page paths, added project default-site resolution, injected document-version switching into rendered Docusaurus HTML, and updated README/spec docs to explain the new granularity and routing model.
changed_files: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

commands.notes: Repo-local documentation entry point was read before reshaping the design.
Seed flow was reviewed and then reworked around per-page documents and snapshot-based versions.
Renderer behavior was reviewed before adding project-route URL generation and a version switcher.
Sample source layout was inspected to validate the new seed granularity assumptions.

quality_notes: Project-level site routing and per-document version modeling are now documented and implemented together.
The document detail UI now distinguishes HTML display from raw markdown and attachment access.
risks: The initial implementation still relied on guessed markdown_entry_path values for seeded builds, which later required follow-up correction.
Runtime verification of db:seed and request specs remained incomplete in this session.
remaining_concerns: Seeded build route resolution needed follow-up work, which was later handled under the reopened issue #2 path mismatch investigation.
Browser-level confirmation of Docusaurus JS behavior was still pending when the original refactor was finished.

signals.note: The main HTML display flow was moved from document-version routes to project-based site routes.
External sample seed behavior was made explicit in code and docs around page-level documents and snapshot-based versions.
